name: Default Dashboard (Overview)
description: Application home — tma-portal Overview dashboard (My Projects — Overview). Three-column layout (sidebar / main / rightbar) with project tab bar, SnowUI hero summary, What's on the road timeline, Latest Files, Project Spendings table, footer, and notifications / activities / contacts. Fully interactive (navigation, expandable groups, theme, search, drawers).

clients.title: Clients
sections: Selectable data table (Order ID / User / Project / Address / Date / Status)
clients.interactions: row + select-all checkboxes, row highlight, list/grid view toggle, pagination active page; Add opens add-data view

emptyState.demo: Append ?empty=1 to show empty state on Clients

add-data.title: New entry
add-data.interactions: Auto-stages on input; navigate away to Clients or Users; second Add commits staged row

users.title: Users
sections: List: table (Serial / User / Email / Address / Registration date)
users.interactions: row + select-all checkboxes, row highlight, address copy on hover, list/grid view toggle (list = table, grid = avatar tiles per Figma 32546:96146), click user opens side info panel (Figma 32546:96148), pagination active page; Add opens add-data view

emptyState.demo: Append ?empty=1 to show empty state on Users

interactions.navigation: Active-state switching; updates page title + breadcrumb; persisted in localStorage
interactions.expandableGroups: User Profile / Account / Corporate / Blog / Social accordion subnavs
interactions.header: Sidebar collapses to a 72px icon-only rail on desktop (labels hidden, hover shows native tooltip) or opens the mobile menu; rightbar collapses/hides on desktop or opens as a drawer; favorite (star); theme toggle (light/dark); recently; notifications
interactions.overviewTabs: Underline tab bar (Overview / Targets / Budget / Users / Files / Activity / Settings) + Add User / Add Target actions
interactions.search: Command palette — '/' to open, type to filter pages, arrow keys + Enter to navigate

breakpoints.one: <=1024px (single column; bottom TabBar + iOS Home menu replace the sidebar)

mobile.name: Home (mobile)
mobile.menu: Large 'Home' title + search field + Favorites and Dashboards grouped cards (white rounded cards with row dividers)

sections.name: Tab bar — Overview / Targets / Budget / Users / Files / Activity / Settings
Hero — SnowUI summary (status strip, tasks, due date, budget, SnowLogo40, avatar group)
What's on the road? (week picker + activity timeline)
Latest Files (FilePdf / FileJpg / FileXls + upload drop zone)
Project Spendings (Manager / Date / Amount / Status table)
Footer (© 2026 TM ANTOINE Advisory · About / Support / Contact Us)

notes: Overview content rendered by TMAOverview.mount() into [data-overview]. Brand logo: icons/brands/SnowLogo40.svg only — no inline SVG.
